properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come, my child, there is a place, When you're lost, you will be found, You'll be safe, and you'll belong, You will hear the sweetest sound.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is the place where we pray, This is the place where we cry This is the place where we start Till death do us part Where we say goodbye.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here we leave all our pain, Find forgiveness and grace, Here we walk down the aisle, Dedicate every child, Here in this sacred place.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Break some bread, come, share the wine, At this table, there is a place, Bring your fears, take his peace, Come and share this Holy space.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy, holy (Holy, holy) Holy, holy, God almighty, Emmanuel.
